titles.title: I Am Only In This Message by Cgrace

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There are many others God could have chosen That are more learned than I Who know the every movement Of the stars in the sky But he looked deeper than the appearance And he saw me sitting there I'm only in this message by Grace

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm only in this message by grace It is only by grace That I run in this race I don't know why my Lord God chose me But I'm thankful anyway I'm only in this message by grace

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now don't worry if you don't have A Master's degree God sees your deep desire And he wants you to be By his precious side in glory Eternally It's not by works But by his wonderful grace
